verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable core immediately: "turning it into a Progressive Web App (PWA) built around a service worker"; B opens with "No worries" before getting there.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits around the key implementation fork: "read-only or read-write offline?" and says "Don't hand-roll it; use Workbox"; B surveys more options like "RxDB, ElectricSQL, PouchDB/CouchDB, Replicache, or Yjs".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives the core decision, required pieces, caching strategy, and verification without burying the plan.
